overview: Dream Capture India is a premium luxury modelling and casting agency platform with a black, gold, and dark brown theme. It provides a complete end-to-end system for talent onboarding, payment processing, portfolio management, project assignment, and admin control.
features: Luxury homepage with animated hero, project categories, gallery, benefits, and contact section
Stripe payment onboarding (₹1499 fixed fee) with auto-confirmation
Candidate portal with Internet Identity login, portfolio uploads, dashboard, notifications
Admin control panel for candidate approval, project management, shortlisting, and bulk notifications
Centralized config system for payment keys, contact details, and branding
In-app notification system with unread badge counts
Role-based access control for admin and candidate roles
Responsive luxury design across mobile, tablet, and desktop
